mapper.sql: SELECT sg.id, sg.station_id, sg.company_id, sg.name, sg.type, sg.status, sg.mode, sg.target_power_kw, sg.start_time, sg.end_time, sg.version_no, sg.remark, sg.created_at, sg.updated_at, st.name AS station_name, st.capacity_kwp, st.status AS station_status, st.data_quality, st.sort_index AS station_sort_index, co.name AS company_name, co.region, co.sort_index AS company_sort_index, ss.last_simulated_revenue_cny, ss.confidence_low_cny, ss.confidence_high_cny, ss.success_probability_pct, rd.estimated_revenue_cny AS today_estimated_revenue_cny, rd.actual_revenue_cny AS today_actual_revenue_cny FROM sg_strategy sg JOIN sa_station st ON st.id = sg.station_id JOIN sa_company co ON co.id = sg.company_id LEFT JOIN sg_strategy_snapshot ss ON ss.strategy_id = sg.id LEFT JOIN sg_revenue_daily rd ON rd.strategy_id = sg.id AND rd.biz_date = #{bizDate}
mapper.select: ORDER BY co.sort_index, st.sort_index, sg.updated_at DESC
SELECT strategy_id, period_order, start_slot, end_slot, action_type, target_ratio FROM sg_strategy_period WHERE strategy_id = #{strategyId} ORDER BY period_order
SELECT id, strategy_id, event_time, action, result, deviation_rate_pct, operator_name FROM sg_execution_log WHERE strategy_id = #{strategyId} ORDER BY event_time DESC
SELECT id, strategy_id, event_time, action, result, deviation_rate_pct, operator_name FROM sg_execution_log ORDER BY event_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sg_strategy (id, station_id, company_id, name, type, status, mode, target_power_kw, start_time, end_time, version_no, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.stationId}, #{row.companyId}, #{row.name}, #{row.type}, #{row.status}, #{row.mode}, #{row.targetPowerKw}, #{row.startTime}, #{row.endTime}, #{row.versionNo}, #{row.remark}, #{row.createdAt}, #{row.updatedAt})

INSERT INTO sg_strategy_period (strategy_id, period_order, start_slot, end_slot, action_type, target_ratio) VALUES (#{row.strategyId}, #{row.periodOrder}, #{row.startSlot}, #{row.endSlot}, #{row.actionType}, #{row.targetRatio})

INSERT INTO sg_execution_log (id, strategy_id, event_time, action, result, deviation_rate_pct, operator_name) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.strategyId}, #{row.eventTime}, #{row.action}, #{row.result}, #{row.deviationRatePct}, #{row.operatorName})

INSERT INTO sg_strategy_snapshot (strategy_id, last_simulated_revenue_cny, confidence_low_cny, confidence_high_cny, success_probability_pct) VALUES (#{row.strategyId}, #{row.lastSimulatedRevenueCny}, #{row.confidenceLowCny}, #{row.confidenceHighCny}, #{row.successProbabilityPct})
